data.content: Shipment complete. Work branch work/foolery-90c5 is identical to origin/main (0a24d68c) — no merge required since this beat delivered an external Obsidian note at /Users/cartine/obsidian/Mynotes/foolery/Hosted Foolery Cloud Service Architecture.md, not repo-tracked code. CI green on main (CI workflow success, Coverage Badge success; Changesets failure is release automation, not a code gate). Tagged commit.
